title: Big Station Signs
description: Signs with bigger text and various customisation options, inspired by the UK train network
body:
# Big Station Signs
Vanilla sign text too small? Unicode signs or banner letters too ugly? This mod adds big versions of the vanilla signs, as well as Big Station Signs inspired by the UK rail network. They display larger text, and have a simple editor to add colour and formatting. I made this with create mod trains in mind, but you don't need that mod for this mod to function.

Inspired by [Big Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-signs) and [Click Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/clicksigns)



![view of a station sign from a train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0456c2326a606e172eb30c526f2f6379c40eae28.jpeg)


## Current list of designs
- Each vanilla wood type
- National Rail
- Scotrail
- Avanti West Coast
- Southeastern
- London Northeastern Railway
- Greater Anglia
- West Midlands Railway
- Merseyrail
- London Northwestern Railway
- Southern
- South Western Railway
- Transpennine Express
- Northern
- East Midlands Railway
- Great Western Railway
- C2C
- Chiltern Railways
